hyperedges.label: Audio Capture to STT Provider Pipeline
Safe Text Insertion Pipeline (Target → Validate → Insert → Verify)

nodes.label: Universal Voice-to-Text Desktop Application
nodes.rationale: Production-grade, commercially shippable Windows dictation application using .NET 10 LTS, WPF MVVM, Deepgram Nova-3 primary STT, Azure Cognitive Services secondary STT, Whisper.net offline STT. Central package management enforced. No prototypes or MVPs — all code must be tested and wired into runtime.

nodes.label: .NET Solution Structure (UniversalDictation.sln)
nodes.rationale: 13 projects under src/ (DesktopApp, Desktop.Core, Desktop.Audio, Desktop.Transcription, Desktop.Targeting, Desktop.Insertion, Desktop.NativeInterop, NativeMessagingHost, ControlPlane.Api, ControlPlane.Application, ControlPlane.Domain, ControlPlane.Infrastructure, AdminPortal) and 3 test projects (Unit, Integration, Contract). Central package management — no Version= on PackageReference.

nodes.label: Dictation Session State Machine
nodes.rationale: 16-state thread-safe machine in Desktop.Core. States: SignedOut, Idle, Arming, Capturing, Streaming, Finalizing, ReviewRequired, ReadyToInsert, ValidatingTarget, Inserting, Verifying, Completed, Cancelled, RecoverableFailure, FatalFailure, Offline. Illegal transitions throw InvalidSessionTransitionException. Records SessionTransitionRecord without content.

nodes.label: Serilog Logging Redaction Pipeline
nodes.rationale: IDestructuringPolicy or LogEventEnricher replaces [Redacted] tagged properties with ***. Protects transcript text, window title hash source, clipboard content, API tokens, and file paths with user names.

nodes.label: WASAPI Audio Capture Service
nodes.rationale: NAudio 3.x WasapiCapture, resample to 16kHz PCM16 via MediaFoundationResampler, bounded ring buffer (default 5s), hot-plug via MMDeviceEnumerator, IAsyncEnumerable<AudioFrame>. Never write raw audio to disk.

nodes.label: Deepgram Nova-3 Streaming Adapter
nodes.rationale: WSS to wss://api.deepgram.com/v1/listen, parameters model=nova-3/encoding=linear16/sample_rate=16000/interim_results=true/endpointing=200/keyterm (singular repeated). Short-lived token from Control Plane. 20ms PCM frames. Exponential backoff reconnect max 3 attempts.

nodes.label: Whisper.net Offline Transcription Adapter
nodes.rationale: Whisper.net 1.9.0 CPU-only with ggml-small GGUF model. Processes completed audio buffer (not streaming). Throws OfflineModelNotFoundException if model file missing.

nodes.label: Voice Command Parser
nodes.rationale: Locale-aware (en-US at minimum), deterministic, never passes commands to LLM. Commands extracted before text reaches insertion path. 16 command phrases (new line, new paragraph, punctuation, delete last word/sentence, scratch that, undo, stop/cancel dictation).

nodes.label: Global Hotkey Service
nodes.rationale: Win32 RegisterHotKey/UnregisterHotKey via P/Invoke. Push-to-talk and toggle modes. Detects conflicts and throws HotkeyConflictException. Cleans up on dispose. Must not block UI thread.

nodes.label: No-Activate WPF Overlay Window
nodes.rationale: WS_EX_NOACTIVATE | WS_EX_TOOLWINDOW via P/Invoke in OnSourceInitialized. WM_MOUSEACTIVATE returns MA_NOACTIVATE via HwndSource hook. Must never steal keyboard focus during dictation.

nodes.label: Target Context Service
nodes.rationale: UI Automation for focused element. Captures ProcessId, ProcessExecutable, ProcessIntegrityLevel (GetTokenInformation P/Invoke), window handles, AutomationElementRuntimeId, ClassName, WindowTitleHash (SHA-256 only — no raw title). Revalidates before insertion; rejects if process/RuntimeId/Sensitivity/IntegrityLevel changed.

nodes.label: Text Insertion Adapter Chain
nodes.rationale: Priority chain: BrowserExtensionAdapter -> UiaValuePatternAdapter -> SendInputAdapter -> ClipboardFallbackAdapter. Never inserts into SensitivityClassification != Normal. Each adapter reports why higher-priority was skipped. Post-insertion verification reads back field value.

nodes.label: Project Orchestrator Agent (teamwork_preview_orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Pure orchestrator: never writes code directly. Decomposes into 7 sequential milestones. Pattern: Project Pattern. Self-succeeds at 16 spawns. Parallel E2E Testing + Implementation tracks.

nodes.label: Milestone 5: Safe Text Insertion Adapter Chain
nodes.norm_label: milestone 5: safe text insertion adapter chain

nodes.label: Milestone 6: WPF Desktop UI Overlay & Composition
nodes.norm_label: milestone 6: wpf desktop ui overlay & composition

nodes.label: E2E Testing Track
nodes.rationale: Parallel track to implementation milestones. Opaque-box requirement-driven test suite. 4-tier methodology: Feature Coverage (>=5 per feature), Boundary & Corner, Cross-Feature Combinations, Real-World Application Scenarios. Publishes TEST_READY.md for M7 integration.

nodes.label: E2E Testing Track Orchestrator Metadata README
nodes.norm_label: e2e testing track orchestrator metadata readme

nodes.label: Explorer Agent for E2E Codebase Investigation
nodes.norm_label: explorer agent for e2e codebase investigation

nodes.label: Rust/Tauri/ScribeRx Prior Prototype (Removed)
nodes.rationale: Previous Rust/Tauri/UI implementation was deleted in commit 0917270a. Legacy assessment (D1) must document rejected patterns: blind clipboard-only insertion, mock EMR context, broad fuzzy word replacement, hardcoded paths, raw transcript logging, predictable temp WAV files, direct insertion without target validation.

nodes.label: Directory.Build.props (Shared Build Settings)
nodes.rationale: Shared build configuration: nullable enabled, TreatWarningsAsErrors, net10.0-windows target, Deterministic, SourceLink. Must not be overwritten.

nodes.label: Directory.Packages.props (Central Package Management)
nodes.rationale: All NuGet package versions declared centrally. Individual projects must NOT specify Version= on PackageReference. Must not be overwritten.

nodes.label: ControlPlane.Api (ASP.NET Core Web API)
nodes.rationale: Provides short-lived tokens to STT adapters at runtime — no credentials embedded in the desktop app.

nodes.label: 4-Tier E2E Testing Methodology
nodes.rationale: Tier 1: Feature Coverage (>=5 per feature), Tier 2: Boundary & Corner Cases (>=5 per feature), Tier 3: Cross-Feature Combinations (pairwise major interactions), Tier 4: Real-World Application Scenarios (at least 5). Total: ~11*N + max(5, N/2) test cases.

nodes.label: Central Package Management Pattern
nodes.rationale: All NuGet versions declared in Directory.Packages.props; no Version= on individual PackageReference. Ensures version consistency across 16 projects.
